testcase.name: Login
testcase.system-err: jul. 06, 2026 9:31:27 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 jul. 06, 2026 9:31:27 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.201. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.38.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Login01
